mapper.insert:
insert into ServiceArea (SAName, SADirection, WayNum, CompactParking, LargeParking, DisabledParking, Address, Tel, ShopCode) values
(#{vo.SAName}, #{vo.SADirection}, #{vo.WayNum}, #{vo.CompactParking}, #{vo.LargeParking}, #{vo.DisabledParking}, #{vo.Address}, #{vo.Tel}, #{vo.ShopCode})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE SAName = values(SAName), SADirection = values(SADirection), WayNum = values(WayNum), CompactParking = values(CompactParking), LargeParking = values(LargeParking), DisabledParking = values(DisabledParking), Address = values(Address), Tel = values(Tel), ShopCode = values(ShopCode)
